atomic_facts.fact: The LCD screen displays '00:30' in large white digits against a bright blue background.
The text 'Instant Pot Duo Plus' is printed at the top of the control panel.
The first frame appears to be viewed through a reflective glass surface, showing reflections of a tiled area on the left.
The second frame provides a clear, unobstructed view of the control panel buttons.
Button labels include 'Soup Broth', 'Meat Stew', 'Bean Chili', 'Cake', 'Egg', 'Slow Cook', 'Sauté', 'Rice', 'Multigrain', 'Porridge', 'Steam', 'Sterilize', 'Yogurt', and 'Pressure Cook'.
Center buttons include 'Pressure Level', 'Keep Warm', '-', '+', 'Delay Start', and 'Cancel'.
